name: Butler Heartbeat
description: Scheduled agent check-ins (the butler wakes up, looks around, and pushes to the phone when it matters), plus a notify_owner tool for unprompted messages.

entries.description: Scheduled beats. Each fires a fresh agent turn over the gateway's own chat endpoint; the reply is pushed to the phone. Default: a daily 08:00 morning briefing.

id.description: Stable identifier (used for state + manual runs).

at.description: Daily local time, e.g. "08:00" or "9:30pm". Use this OR every.

every.description: Interval, e.g. "2h", "90m". Use this OR at.

prompt.description: The instruction the butler wakes up to. In decide mode, tell it to reply HEARTBEAT_OK when nothing needs attention.

mode.description: always = push every reply; decide = the model can stay silent with HEARTBEAT_OK. Default decide.

title.description: Push notification title. Defaults to the butler's persona name.

model.description: Optional model override for this beat (x-openclaw-model).

enabled.description: Set false to pause an entry. Default true.

quietHours.description: Window during which interval (every) beats are suppressed. Daily (at) beats are unaffected.
